_metadata.name: L2 - Attack Surface Reduction Rules (Block Mode)
_metadata.cisMapping: Endpoint Detection, Antivirus & ASR: same rules as L1 Audit, promoted to enforced Block
_metadata.assignmentNote: Deploy to PrivilegedAdmin (Test ring) first. Only extend to StandardUser after a 2-4 week audit-mode validation window (Policies/L1/ASR-AuditMode.json) shows zero legitimate-workflow hits across the fleet.
_metadata.rollback: Delete/disable profile immediately reverts to Audit mode enforcement (or no ASR if L1 profile also removed). If a specific rule breaks a workflow, add a file/folder/process exclusion rather than disabling the whole rule fleet-wide.

name: ZeroTrust-L2-ASR-BlockMode
description: Same core ASR rule set as the L1 audit profile, promoted to Block. Only assign after audit-mode telemetry confirms no false-positive impact for the target persona.
